summary: Testing iteration 27 - Comprehensive stress test of ROOK TTRPG App. Tested Journal CRUD, GM workflow (campaigns/NPCs/locations), subscription system. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: CharacterSheetFull.js does not implement dice roll buttons despite DiceRollButton component existing. 35 backend tests pass, 19 frontend tests pass (4 skipped for known dice bug).

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Dice roll buttons are NOT implemented. DiceRollButton component exists in DiceRollButton.js but CharacterSheetFull.js (used by /characters/:id route) does not import or use it. Ability scores, saving throws, skills, and initiative display modifiers but are NOT clickable for dice rolling.
ui_bugs.fix: Import DiceRollButton from '@/components/DiceRollButton' and add DiceRollButton components to: AbilityScoreBlock (for ability checks), saving throw displays, SkillRow (for skill checks), and initiative display

integration_issues.issue: From iteration 26: handleSubscribe() missing origin_url in checkout request body, causing 422 validation error
integration_issues.status: NOT VERIFIED - focused on other features this iteration

breakdown.journal-crud.spec.ts: 7/7 passed - Session Journal CRUD fully working
breakdown.character-dice-rolls.spec.ts: 4/8 passed (4 skipped) - Modifiers display but dice buttons missing
breakdown.backend/test_journal_crud.py: 12/12 passed - Journal and GM API endpoints working

quarantined_tests: character-dice-rolls.spec.ts (4 tests) - Skipped: dice roll buttons not implemented
action_items: CRITICAL: Add dice roll functionality to CharacterSheetFull.js - import DiceRollButton and add to ability scores, saving throws, skills, and initiative
CRITICAL (from iter 26): Fix PricingPage.js handleSubscribe() - add origin_url: window.location.origin to checkout request body
seed_data_creation: Tests use existing stress_test_1772651200@test.com user and TEST_Campaign
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session Journal CRUD fully working (backend + frontend). GM workflow (campaigns, NPCs, locations) fully working. Subscription system backend working. CRITICAL: CharacterSheetFull.js needs dice roll buttons added - the DiceRollButton component exists but is not used. PricingPage checkout still has origin_url bug from iteration 26.

session_journal_crud.description: Create, Read, Update, Delete journal entries fully working

journal_tab_player_dashboard.description: Journal tab visible and functional in Player Dashboard

subscription_checkout.description: Checkout endpoint generates Stripe URL correctly

character_sheet_dice_rolls.description: CRITICAL: Dice roll buttons NOT implemented in CharacterSheetFull.js

ability_score_dice_buttons.description: Ability scores display modifiers but are not clickable

saving_throw_dice_buttons.description: Saving throws display modifiers but are not clickable

skill_dice_buttons.description: All 18 skills display correctly but dice buttons missing

initiative_dice_button.description: Initiative displays modifier but dice button missing

bugs_found.issue: DiceRollButton component not imported or used
bugs_found.error: Character sheet ability scores, saving throws, skills, and initiative display modifiers but are NOT clickable for dice rolling
bugs_found.fix:
1. Add import: import { DiceRollButton } from '@/components/DiceRollButton'
2. In AbilityScoreBlock: Add <DiceRollButton modifier={modifier} label={`${ability.fullName} Check`} />
3. For saving throws: Add DiceRollButton with save modifier
4. In SkillRow: Add <DiceRollButton modifier={totalMod} label={skill.name} />
5. For Initiative: Add DiceRollButton with initiative modifier
